{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":675539,"duration_api_ms":528480,"ttft_ms":4806,"ttft_stream_ms":3312,"time_to_request_ms":212,"num_turns":67,"result":"Step 2 (shared-render-loop) is complete and committed.

**Summary:**
- `src/fabric/sharedGifRenderLoop.js` — `createSharedGifRenderLoop(fabricCanvas)`: one shared `requestAnimationFrame` loop per canvas that advances only the `AnimatedGif` objects whose frame delay has elapsed, calling `renderAll()` at most once per tick regardless of how many GIFs updated.
- `src/hooks/useFabricCanvas.js` — creates and starts the loop when the canvas is created, registers/unregisters `AnimatedGif` instances via `object:added`/`object:removed`, and stops the loop before disposing the canvas. Verified in Fabric's source that `loadFromJSON` fires `object:added` too, so restored GIFs auto-register without extra code.
- Tests: 4 new unit tests for the loop itself, plus a regression test confirming the loop is torn down on canvas dispose (no stray renders after unmount).

Verification: `npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test` all pass (24 files, 137 tests, no regressions). Report written to `docs/plan/animated-gif-support/reports/step2-shared-render-loop.md`, step index updated to `completed`, changes committed in two commits (feat + chore metadata) matching the existing pattern in this branch.

One honest caveat noted in the report: the dispose regression test had to swallow a `DOMException` (`NotFoundError`) that surfaces during React's unmount of the real `<canvas>` element — a pre-existing artifact of Fabric.js wrapping the canvas in its own DOM structure outside React's knowledge, unrelated to the loop cleanup logic itself and out of scope to fix here.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"a6104618-ac87-4ac2-8302-506622353c67","total_cost_usd":3.119147199999999,"usage":{"input_tokens":6393,"cache_creation_input_tokens":111566,"cache_read_input_tokens":5784494,"output_tokens":45392,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":111566,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":588,"cache_read_input_tokens":131900,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1150,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1150},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":14199,"outputTokens":29,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.014343999999999999,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-sonnet-5":{"inputTokens":6393,"outputTokens":45392,"cacheReadInputTokens":5784494,"cacheCreationInputTokens":111566,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":3.104803199999999,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"15fffccd-b5fb-49da-b003-58855b089c41"}
